name: Cortex
description: AI Chief of Staff — personal knowledge system for Claude

FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT.description: Firebase service account JSON (from GCP Console > IAM > Service Accounts > Keys)

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth Client ID (for Calendar + Gmail — optional, can add later)

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth Client Secret (for Calendar + Gmail — optional, can add later)
